spec.rawSql:
SELECT time, ABS(rpm) AS rpm
FROM telemetry_records
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time,
  mot_c  AS "Motor (°C)",
  igbt_c AS "IGBT (°C)"
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, mode
FROM telemetry_records
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, level, node, message, fields
FROM event_logs
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC;

SELECT time, rpm
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, volt
FROM telemetry_records
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time,
  volt AS "Voltage (V)",
  amp  AS "Current (A)"
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, amp
FROM telemetry_records
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, trq
FROM telemetry_records
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, trq AS "Torque (N·m)"
FROM telemetry_records
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, mot_c
FROM telemetry_records
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, igbt_c
FROM telemetry_records
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;
